title: December
why_this_song: December by Collective Soul (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Don't scream about, don't think aloud
Turn your head now, baby, just spit me out
Don't worry about, don't speak of doubt
Turn your head now, baby, just spit me out
December promise you gave unto me
December clouds are now covering me
December songs no longer I sing

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "turn" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "turn" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Why drink the water from my hand?
Don't throw away your basic needs
December clouds are now covering me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Contagious as you think I am
Don't scream about, don't think aloud
December promise you gave unto me

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "December" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "December", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "December" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "December" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "December", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "December", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "December" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "December" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
